lines.lyric: Jigeum i noraega naega dwel su itge
lines.lyric_hangul: 지금 이 노래가 내가 될 수 있게
lines.lyric_translation: You made this song who I am

lines.lyric_hangul: 만들어 준 네가 다가온다 (셋, 둘, 하나)
lines.lyric_translation: And here you come / Three two one

lines.lyric_hangul: 뭐든지 다 주고 싶어
lines.lyric_translation: Want to give everything

lines.lyric_hangul: 나에게 너만 있다면
lines.lyric_translation: If I can just have you

lines.lyric: Won’t let them break your heart oh no
lines.lyric_hangul: Won't let them break your heart, oh no
lines.lyric_translation: Won’t let them break your heart oh no

lines.lyric_hangul: 네가 없다면 난 아무것도 아냐
lines.lyric_translation: Without you I’m nothing

lines.lyric: No words are enough for you
lines.lyric_hangul: No words are enough for you
lines.lyric_translation: No words are enough for you

lines.lyric_hangul: 노랫말로 담고 싶어
lines.lyric_translation: Want to write it lyrical

lines.lyric_hangul: So 모든 나의 감정 너로 읽고 쓰게 해줘
lines.lyric_translation: So let me read and write / My emotions through you

lines.lyric: I just want to love you
lines.lyric_hangul: I just want to love you
lines.lyric_translation: I just want to love you

lines.lyric_hangul: 널 혼자 두지 않아 난
lines.lyric_translation: Alone I don’t want to leave you

lines.lyric: I just want you, I need you
lines.lyric_hangul: I just want you, I need you
lines.lyric_translation: I just want you, I need you

lines.lyric: I bameun jjalbgo neon dangyeonhaji ana
lines.lyric_hangul: 이 밤은 짧고 넌 당연하지 않아
lines.lyric_translation: The night is short can’t take you for granted

lines.lyric_hangul: I tell you, this time, I wanna rock with you
lines.lyric_translation: I tell you / This time I wanna rock with you

parts.lyric: This time I wanna rock with you

lines.lyric: Moonlight i bame Shine on you
lines.lyric_hangul: Moonlight, 이 밤에 shine on you
lines.lyric_translation: Moonlight tonight Shine on you

lines.lyric: Tonight I wanna ride with you
lines.lyric_hangul: Tonight, I wanna ride with you
lines.lyric_translation: Tonight I wanna ride with you

lines.lyric_hangul: 그 어디라도
lines.lyric_translation: Wherever we go

lines.lyric_hangul: Baby, hold on, baby, hold on (어디에서도)
lines.lyric_translation: Baby hold on Baby hold on / Wherever we are

lines.lyric_hangul: 세상이 끝나더라도
lines.lyric_translation: Even if the world is ending

lines.lyric_hangul: I wanna ride with you
lines.lyric_translation: I wanna ride with you

lines.lyric_hangul: 널 위해 달리고 있어
lines.lyric_translation: I’m running for you

lines.lyric_hangul: 널 위해서라면 뭐든
lines.lyric_translation: Do anything for you

lines.lyric_hangul: 숨이 멈출 때까지 난 너만
lines.lyric_translation: Just you till my last breath

lines.lyric: No words are enough for you
lines.lyric_hangul: No words are enough for you
lines.lyric_translation: No words are enough for you

lines.lyric_translation: Want to keep it melodical

lines.lyric_hangul: So 너의 모든 감정 내가 들을 수 있게 해줘
lines.lyric_translation: So let me listen to / All your emotions

lines.lyric_translation: Fall into your eyes

lines.lyric: Modeun sungandeuri oroji neol hyanghae isseo

lines.lyric_translation: Every moment is pointing to you

lines.lyric_hangul: 나는 너 하나로 충분해
lines.lyric_translation: All I ever need is you

lines.lyric_translation: Take nothing for granted

lines.lyric_translation: You’re all I got
